svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: ArcGIS Pro Salah MCP system architecture
svg.desc: Claude Desktop talks over MCP to one FastMCP server exposing four tool groups: pro (ArcPy on disk), portal (ArcGIS API for Python to ArcGIS Online), webapp (static Maps SDK for JS site), and live (HTTP plus token to a .NET add-in inside ArcGIS Pro that drives the live session via QueuedTask).
svg.text: accent = the new live .NET bridge you're about to build
